title: Elderflower facial toner
subtitle: A gentle water-based facial toner with elderflower hydrosol, alcohol-free witch hazel, and aloe vera
excerpt: Elderflower hydrosol has a light, fresh floral scent and is suitable for all skin types including sensitive. Combined with alcohol-free witch hazel and aloe vera gel, this toner is applied after cleansing to rebalance the skin and leave it smooth before moisturising. A broad-spectrum preservative keeps it safe for 3 months.
sourceNotes: Facial toner formulation: standard cosmetic water-based toner. Elderflower hydrosol (Sambucus nigra): floral water suitable for sensitive skin; pH approximately 4 to 5. Witch hazel (Hamamelis virginiana) alcohol-free: mild astringent, suitable for sensitive skin. Aloe vera gel: soothing. Broad-spectrum preservative at 1% (Optiphen or equivalent). All water-containing formulas require a preservative.

recipe.yieldDescription: ~100 ml toner (fills a 100 ml spray or pump bottle)
recipe.batchNotes: Scale proportionally. Keep preservative at 1% of total batch weight.
recipe.shelfLifeNotes: 3 months at room temperature with preservative. Discard if the toner becomes cloudy or develops an off smell.

glossaryTerms.definition: A floral water produced as a by-product of steam distillation of plant material. Elderflower hydrosol contains trace water-soluble compounds from the flowers and has a light, fresh scent distinct from elderflower essential oil.
A liquid applied to cleansed skin before moisturiser. Toners rebalance skin pH after cleansing and prepare the skin to absorb subsequent products.

A distillate of Hamamelis virginiana bark and leaves. The alcohol-free version is suitable for sensitive and dry skin types. Acts as a mild astringent without the drying effect of the alcohol-based version.

content.text: adds mild astringency without stripping. Aloe vera and glycerin add slip. Because this formula contains water, a broad-spectrum preservative at 1% is required. Do not omit it: an unpreserved water-based toner will grow contamination within days.

items.prepNote: Floral water base; substitute distilled water if unavailable
Alcohol-free version only; not witch hazel with isopropyl alcohol

content.text: Weigh all ingredients into the beaker and stir gently until fully combined. Transfer to a clean spray or pump bottle. Label with the date made.
Apply to cleansed skin with a cotton pad or mist directly onto the face. Pat gently. Follow with moisturiser while the skin is still slightly damp.
3 months at room temperature. Keep capped between uses. Discard if cloudy or off-smelling.
